races.name: Human
races.description: Versatile and adaptable, humans thrive in any environment.

races.name: Elf
races.description: Graceful and long-lived, with an affinity for nature and magic.

races.name: Dwarf
races.description: Stout and sturdy, renowned for craftsmanship and resilience.

races.name: Halfling
races.description: Small and nimble, with a knack for stealth and good fortune.

races.name: Orc
races.description: Powerful and fierce, with unmatched strength and endurance.

races.name: Gnome
races.description: Clever and curious, with an inventive spirit and sharp wit.

races.name: Half-Elf
races.description: Blending human adaptability with elven grace.

races.name: Dragonborn
races.description: Proud and draconic, bearing the blood of ancient dragons.
